headline: Can American Airlines (AAL) Close the Profitability Gap With Delta and United?
summary: American Airlines Group Inc. (NASDAQ:AAL) seeks to close its profitability gap with rivals Delta Air Lines and United Airlines. Last year, United generated about $3 billion more in profit than American, while Delta earned roughly $5 billion more. American Airlines CEO Robert Isom has said the company’s long-term plan is to close that margin gap. […]

headline: 1 Value Stock to Own for Decades and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: The low valuation multiples for value stocks provide a margin of safety that growth stocks rarely offer. However, the challenge lies in determining whether these cheap assets are genuinely undervalued or simply on sale due to their potentially deteriorating business models.

raw.headline: 1 Value Stock to Own for Decades and 2 That Underwhelm

headline: Joby Aviation shares climb on exclusive UK air taxi partnership with Virgin Atlantic (NYSE:JOBY)
summary: Virgin Atlantic to become exclusive UK airline partnerJoby Aviation (NYSE:JOBY) shares gained 4% on Wednesday after the electric aircraft developer announced a long-term partnership with Virgin Atlantic to introduce commercial air taxi services across the United Kingdom. The agreement, unveiled during the Farnborough International Airshow, names Virgin Atlantic as Joby’s exclusive airline partner for UK air taxi operations.

headline: Joby and Virgin Atlantic Finalize Deal to Bring Electric Air Taxi Service to the UK
summary: FARNBOROUGH, England, July 22, 2026--Joby Aviation, Inc. (NYSE: JOBY), a company developing electric air taxis for commercial passenger service, and Virgin Atlantic, a premium long-haul UK airline, today signed a definitive agreement at the Farnborough International Airshow, formalizing the partnership the companies first announced in 2025 to bring Joby's air taxi service to the UK.

raw.headline: Joby and Virgin Atlantic Finalize Deal to Bring Electric Air Taxi Service to the UK
raw.summary: FARNBOROUGH, England, July 22, 2026--Joby Aviation, Inc. (NYSE: JOBY), a company developing electric air taxis for commercial passenger service, and Virgin Atlantic, a premium long-haul UK airline, today signed a definitive agreement at the Farnborough International Airshow, formalizing the partnership the companies first announced in 2025 to bring Joby's air taxi service to the UK.

headline: Shell (LSE:SHEL) Signs Five Year SAF Deal With Delta Across Major U.S. Airports
summary: Shell (LSE:SHEL) and Delta Air Lines have signed a new five year agreement for sustainable aviation fuel (SAF). The partnership aims to increase SAF capacity and related infrastructure across major U.S. airports. The deal includes support for next generation SAF technology development in North America. Shell is using this latest agreement with Delta Air Lines to deepen its role in sustainable aviation fuel, a segment that sits at the intersection of energy and transport. For investors...
